title: Verify Deactivated Extension Moves to Inactive Filter

actions.description: Log in using admin@example.com and admin123 from prerequisites

actions.instruction: Navigate to the extensions admin page
actions.description: Navigate to the extensions admin page

actions.instruction: Verify an element with selector `.inactive-extension-card` is visible
actions.description: Verify the inactive extension card is visible

actions.instruction: Verify no elements with selector `.inactive-extension-card` are visible in the Active tab
actions.description: Verify no elements with selector .inactive-extension-card are visible in the Active tab
